title: tarenna coriacea
intro: Tarenna coriacea is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a type of flowering plant. The medicinal properties of Tarenna coriacea are rooted in its use in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Tarenna coriacea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal decoction or infusion, which is then used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
